storyboard.content: Persistent mild nausea, especially in the morning, that has been going on for about 6 weeks
Occasional vomiting, mostly in the morning
My bowel habits have changed - I go back and forth between constipation and loose stools
No blood in my stool that I have noticed
Symptoms have been gradually building over the past 6 weeks
Mild to moderate - affecting my daily life and appetite but I am still able to go to work
35-year-old female with no mentioned prior medical history
